whyChooseDermitDescription: Experience the future of dermatology with our secure, convenient, and professional platform
quickResponseDescription: Get expert consultations within 30 minutes of your request
certifiedExpertsDescription: Board-certified dermatologists with years of experience
personalizedCareDescription: Tailored treatment plans based on your specific skin concerns
readyToGetStartedDescription: Getting expert dermatology care has never been easier. No waiting rooms. No judgment. Just simple, secure online consultations — on your terms. Start your skin check today in just a few clicks.
welcomeBackDescription: Manage your skin health consultations and track your progress with our expert dermatologists
newConsultationDescription: Start a new consultation with a certified dermatologist
noUpcomingAppointmentsDescription: Schedule your first consultation with our dermatology experts.
newConsultationRequestDescription: Share your skin concern with our certified dermatologists for professional advice
uploadImagesOptionalDescription: Upload clear photos of your skin concern for better diagnosis
uploadPhotosDescription: Click to browse or drag and drop your images here
tip1: Use good lighting - natural light works best
tip3: Keep the camera steady and in focus
tip4: Include surrounding healthy skin for comparison
expectStep1: A doctor will be assigned to you in under 10 minutes
expectStep2: You will enter a private chat room with your doctor where you can further describe your issue and send more pictures if necessary
expectStep3: Your doctor will then give you a treatment plan suited to your needs or will guide you through your next steps
medicalInformationDescription: Provide details about your skin concern and medical history
skinConcernPrompt: Tell us what's going on with your skin? *
skinConcernPromptDescription: Describe your main skin concern (e.g., 'Red, itchy rash on my arms for 2 weeks')
knownMedicalConditionsDescription: List any medical conditions, allergies, or medications you're currently taking
additionalCommentsDescription: Any additional information that might be relevant to your case
importantNoteDescription: This platform is for non-emergency consultations only. If you have a medical emergency, please contact emergency services immediately.
noMessagesYet: No messages yet. Start the conversation!
deletePicturePrompt: Should we delete your picture from our database?
deletePictureNote: If you haven’t uploaded a picture, feel free to ignore this message.
feedbackPrompt: Tell us about your experience with Dermit.
commentsPlaceholder: How was your experience? What can we improve?
followUpConsent: I’m open to being contacted for follow-up.
name: Name
subject: Subject
messagePlaceholder: Please share your feedback, suggestions, or report any issues...
pictureDeletedMessage: Your picture has been deleted from our database.
chatEndedMessage: 💬 This chat has ended. Thank you for your message!
createAccountMessage: Create your account to get started
signUpDescription: Join our platform as a patient or healthcare provider
googleLogoAlt: Google logo, a red 'G' with a blue, yellow, and green tail
doctorFoundDescription: A dermatologist has accepted your consultation request. You'll be redirected to the chat shortly.
lookingForDoctorsDescription: We're notifying our dermatologists about your consultation request. This usually takes just a few minutes.
noConversationsDescription: Start your first consultation to connect with a dermatologist!
